title: fr-to-tech-spec input envelope
description: Input contract for cuo/cto/fr-to-tech-spec. The CUO supervisor (or a direct caller) builds an instance of this envelope and passes it to the skill. Validated at CONTRACT_ECHO time; bootstrap failures map to BOOT-001..008 per SKILL.md §Failure modes.
_note: audit_paths, manifest_path, target_release, caller_persona, trace_id, chain_to are optional with documented defaults. Aligned with SKILL.md frontmatter expects.required_fields + expects.optional_fields.

items.description: Relative path to a feature_request@1 markdown. Each MUST have a sibling *.audit.md with overall_status: pass (enforced at PLAN phase per INV-001).
Optional explicit audit-report paths. If omitted, the skill computes <fr_path with .md replaced by .audit.md> for each fr_path.

output_dir.description: Directory the skill MUST write tech-spec markdowns into. The skill MUST NOT touch any path outside this directory (per INV-004).

manifest_path.description: Optional path to a tech-spec-manifest@1 state file (when defined; v0.2.0+). Default: <output_dir>/manifest.json.

target_release.description: Target release window. Informs scope decomposition: a near-term target permits assuming current infrastructure; a far-term target requires calling out infrastructure changes. Default: 'unspecified'.

caller_persona.description: Persona ID of the caller. Used in the genie.action_log row's persona_id field. Defaults to 'cuo' when invoked directly; 'cuo-cpo' when chained from fr-audit.

trace_id.description: UUID for genie.action_log correlation across the entire pipeline (fr-author + fr-audit + fr-to-tech-spec + downstream).

chain_to.description: Optional. Skills the supervisor should invoke after this one. Default: [] (no follow-up). When the future spec-to-impl-plan skill lands, this will likely default to ['cuo/cto/spec-to-impl-plan'].
